title: JENOLITE Fluorescent Spray Paint | NEON PINK | 400ml | Premium High Visibility Neon Spray Paint | Multi Surface High Viz Paint | Ideal for Hobbies, Graffiti-Art, Crafting & Safety Marking
features: High-Visibility Neon Paint: JENOLITE Fluorescent Paint in offers a bright, eye-catching finish for projects requiring high visibility. Perfect for creating bold statements, enhancing safety, or adding vibrant detail, it ideal as spray paint for plastic, metal, and wood.

Multi-Surface Application: Designed for versatility, this premium neon paint adheres well to a variety of surfaces, including metal, wood, plastic, and more. The neon spray paint offers a radiant and eye-catching look, ideal for creative projects requiring high visibility and brilliance under different lighting conditions. Ideal for hobbies, graffiti-art, crafts, and safety marking on any project.

Perfect for Creative Projects & Safety: Whether for DIY crafts, graffiti-art, or safety marking, JENOLITE Fluorescent Spray Paint makes your designs stand out while providing a durable and professional finish.

Quick Drying, Long-Lasting Formula: Engineered to dry quickly with a smooth, even coat, JENOLITE’s high-quality neon spray paint ensures your work is ready in no time, with a resilient finish that holds up both indoors and outdoors.

Trusted Quality: Produced by JENOLITE, Europe’s leaders in surface treatment, painting and protection, this 400ml can combines decades of expertise with premium performance, ensuring reliable and lasting results for every application.
Application: Apply to white background surface for maximum effect.
